name: GitLab REST API
description: GitLab provides a comprehensive REST API for managing projects, repositories, merge requests, issues, CI/CD pipelines, users, groups, and more. Use this API to automate development workflows, manage code repositories, track issues, review merge requests, trigger and monitor CI/CD pipelines, and manage GitLab resources programmatically.

capabilities.name: projects_list
capabilities.description: List projects accessible to the authenticated user with filtering and sorting options.

capabilities.name: projects_get
capabilities.description: Get detailed information about a specific project by ID or URL-encoded path.

capabilities.name: projects_create
capabilities.description: Create a new project.

capabilities.name: projects_update
capabilities.description: Update a project's settings.

capabilities.name: projects_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a project. Requires owner or admin access.

capabilities.name: merge_requests_list
capabilities.description: List merge requests for a project with optional filtering.

capabilities.name: merge_requests_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific merge request by its IID.

capabilities.name: merge_requests_create
capabilities.description: Create a new merge request.

capabilities.name: merge_requests_update
capabilities.description: Update a merge request's title, description, assignee, labels, or state.

capabilities.name: merge_requests_merge
capabilities.description: Accept and merge a merge request.

capabilities.name: issues_list
capabilities.description: List issues for a project with filtering by state, labels, assignee, and more.

capabilities.name: issues_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific issue by its IID.

capabilities.name: issues_create
capabilities.description: Create a new issue in a project.

capabilities.name: issues_update
capabilities.description: Update an issue's attributes, state, or assignments.

capabilities.name: issues_notes_create
capabilities.description: Create a comment (note) on an issue.

capabilities.name: pipelines_list
capabilities.description: List CI/CD pipelines for a project with optional filtering.

capabilities.name: pipelines_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific pipeline by ID.

capabilities.name: pipelines_create
capabilities.description: Trigger a new pipeline for a branch or tag.

capabilities.name: pipelines_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a running or pending pipeline.

capabilities.name: pipelines_retry
capabilities.description: Retry failed jobs in a pipeline.

capabilities.name: pipelines_jobs_list
capabilities.description: List jobs in a pipeline.

capabilities.name: groups_list
capabilities.description: List groups accessible to the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: groups_get
capabilities.description: Get details of a specific group.

capabilities.name: users_get_current
capabilities.description: Get the profile of the currently authenticated user.

capabilities.name: branches_list
capabilities.description: List branches in a repository.

capabilities.name: branches_create
capabilities.description: Create a new branch.

capabilities.name: releases_list
capabilities.description: List releases for a project.

capabilities.name: releases_create
capabilities.description: Create a new release for a project.
